entity.description: An enticing feast made with liver and chicken feast

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Fancy Feast Classic Tender Liver and Chicken Feast offers a smooth pate made from a combination of liver and chicken feast

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Feed an average-sized adult cat 1 can per 1.4 kilograms of body weight daily
2. Feed up to twice this amount to kittens
3. Pregnant or nursing cats may require two to four times their normal feeding

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool, dry place

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Liver, Meat Broth, Meat By-products, Chicken, Artificial and Natural Flavours, Calcium Phosphate, Guar Gum, Potassium Chloride, Taurine, Salt, Mangesium Sulphate, Thiamine Mononitrate, Vitamin E Supplement, Zinc Sulphate, Ferrous Sulphate, Niacin, Calcium Pantothenate, Vitamin A Supplement, Copper Sulphate, Manganese Sulphate, Menadione Sodium Bisulphite Complex (Source of Vitamin K Activity), Pyridoxine Hydrochloride, Riboflavin Supplement, Vitamin B-12 Supplement, Biotin, Folic Acid, Vitamin D-3 Supplement, Potassium Iodide

product.name: Sheba Cat Food Pouch - Chicken with Tuna

product.description: Delight your cat with Fancy Feast Savory Chicken and turkey Gourmet Cat Food from Purina. Fancy Feast offers your cat enchanting shapes they will love with the delicious taste of real Chicken and Turkey. Fancy feast is vitamin-fortified and provides complete and balanced nutrition for cats of all life stages including kittens.

metaData.Key Information:
• 100% complete and balancing nutrition
• Exquisite taste
• Perfect for everyday feeding
metaData.Preparation:
• Feeding directions:
For Cats Weighing 5 - 9lbs:
1. 1/3 to 2/3 cup of dry food
2. Combine 1/4 to 1/2 cup with one 3oz can of wet or mix 1/3 cup with two 3oz of can food
For Cats Weighing 10 - 14lbs:
1. 2/3 to 1 cup of dry food
2. Combine 1/2 to 3/4 cup with one 3oz can
3. Mix 1/3 to 2/3 cup with two 3oz of can food
